chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.688 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.4144/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection and reply of advocate as at “A” 3. For orders on M.A. No.4115/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------ 18.03.2025 Mr. Javed Ahmed Rajput, advocate for applicant -------------------------------------- Office has raised objection on the ground of maintainability of applicant’s bail application on merits. Record reflects that earlier this Court has disposed of first criminal bail application of applicant on 04.03.2025 on merits and he has not impugned the said order before the Supreme Court of Pakistan. Facing such situation, counsel for applicant does not press this second bail application and intends to approach the Supreme Court of Pakistan. Accordingly instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed along with list applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
